v1_eye_network.name: All-Seeing Network Eye
v1_eye_network.prompt: Circular official seal / emblem. Outer ring contains the text 'OPEN SOURCE INTELLIGENCE AGENCY' arced along the top and 'OSIA' centered at the bottom. 'EST. 2026' on a banner at the base of the central image. Two concentric border rings in the outer circle. Four small stars evenly spaced around the lower ring. Central image: a stylised open eye with an iris made of interconnected network nodes and data-graph edges — the eye that watches power, not the people. Below the eye, two symmetrical branches of topographic contour lines curve outward like roots or watersheds, replacing the olive branch and arrows. Behind the eye, a hexagonal shield with subtle circuit-trace lines. Colour palette: deep void black #0A0C0B background, forest signal green #1A3A2A, warm amber #C8860A metallic accents. NOT navy blue, NOT gold CIA palette, NOT American eagle, NOT Western imperial iconography. Decolonial, anti-imperialist aesthetic. Embossed metallic relief style, cinematic, photorealistic render. Clean white background behind the seal for easy extraction. No extra decorative elements outside the seal circle.
v1_eye_network.usage: logo candidate — review and promote chosen variant to assets/osia_logo_sm.png

v3_owl_circuit.name: Geometric Owl
v3_owl_circuit.prompt: Circular official seal / emblem. Outer ring contains the text 'OPEN SOURCE INTELLIGENCE AGENCY' arced along the top and 'OSIA' centered at the bottom. 'EST. 2026' on a banner at the base of the central image. Two concentric border rings in the outer circle. Four small stars evenly spaced around the lower ring. Central image: a highly geometric, low-poly stylised owl facing forward, wings slightly spread, body composed of circuit-board trace lines and node points. The owl represents wisdom, night vision, and counter-surveillance — watching power from the shadows. v5_earth_grid.name: Earth Grid & Roots
v5_earth_grid.prompt: Circular official seal / emblem. Outer ring contains the text 'OPEN SOURCE INTELLIGENCE AGENCY' arced along the top and 'OSIA' centered at the bottom.
